title: Safety First Aid Group Group HypaCover Low Adherent Dressing Pads for Wounds Absorbent Dressing, 10x10cm (Pack of 25)

features: Individually wrapped sterile pads - helps draw exudates away from wounds
Film surface helps prevent pad from sticking to the wound surface and minimises trauma for casualty upon removal
Hold in place with dressing retention sheets or microporous tape
Suitable for abrasions, superficial cuts, minor burns and lightly exuding wounds
description: Product Description The HypaCover Low Adherent Absorbent Dressings are designed to be just that - a highly absorbent dressing with low adherence so it can be removed with minimal trauma. The dressings are suitable for wounds, superficial cuts, abrasions and even for burns. Pads can be held in place with conforming bandages, dressing retention sheets or microporous tape. Directions Instructions for use: clean the wound, place the pad on the wound, fix it with compliant bandages, dressing retention sheets or microporous tape. Note that the pad does not stick to the wound surface and can be removed minimally traumatically.
